_comment: Should-refuse case — the model should honestly say it doesn't have
the information rather than confabulate. We can't measure this with
chunk-id retrieval metrics (any retrieval is technically wrong), so
we score with keyword_coverage against a refusal phrase. Set
expected_keywords to whatever your model naturally says when
declining — 'don't have', 'not in the provided', 'no information', etc.
query: What is the population of Mars?
